barRaise.topFinding: Sixth straight cycle at needs-attention on the same lone HIGH. v0.98.10 is fully authored (GDD pill v0.98.10 at docs/GDD.html:1380, a paired changelog entry at :4913, and the roster-wide footprint rebalance in source/world3d/building_catalog_3d.gd) but HEAD is still 3918336 (v0.98.9, 2026-06-15) and project.godot config/version still reads 0.98.9, so the work has sat uncommitted five days with the FUSE-truncation-unacceptable files (GDD.html, project.godot) dirty the whole time. The doc-contradiction the 06-19 audit named as the commit gate is largely cleared: the line-1654 worked examples now follow the v0.34.0 defense rule, the roster count reads 37 everywhere (matches the 37-entry catalog), and Field Triage's Assets-tab footprint is reconciled to 3x3, so nothing structural blocks a commit now. The remaining substance is a deferred balance review (the rebalance pushed most buildings to 2x2+, which silently grants +1 defense under the derived rule) plus the three long-carried MEDIUMs: the world_3d profiler baseline, the v0.80.1 ARCHITECTURE.md, and the 2D-residual GDD pointers. Run release.ps1 to land v0.98.10, then a single doc session clears the rest.

actions.title: Run scripts/release.ps1 to commit + push v0.98.10 so HEAD, project.godot (0.98.9 -> 0.98.10), and the GDD pill reconcile and the dirty GDD.html / project.godot / building_catalog_3d.gd stop sitting exposed a sixth cycle (or revert if the rebalance is not landing).

Run the deferred defense-balance review the v0.98.10 changelog flagged: the footprint rebalance pushed most buildings to 2x2+, which grants +1 defense under the v0.34.0 derived rule (GDD:1650). Confirm the roster-wide buff is intended or re-derive the affected values.

2D-residual GDD sweep: re-point the tile-constant note (GDD:4816 still cites retired enemy_base.gd / fog_of_war.gd / noise_heatmap.gd), the auto_pause frame-tick rows (~4648), and era-stamp the M3 roadmap deliverables (~2083).

Capture and log a world_3d profiler run at 1000-3000 enemies in docs/OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md (25 rows, no 3D-crowd baseline) before gameplay drives the 3D crowd; carried ~12 cycles and compounded by the footprint-density bump.
Refresh or retire docs/ARCHITECTURE.md off its v0.80.1 / 2D-stack snapshot (GDD cites it as the synced source) and delete the orphaned source/vfx/damage_number.gd(.uid) in the same pass.
